summary: Ukrainian forces destroyed an enemy FPV drone, demonstrating the effectiveness of their countermeasures against Mavic-type drones, which are deployed in rows of 3-5. In Dobropole, a Ukrainian International MaxxPro armored vehicle was destroyed by a Russian fiber-optic FPV drone "Barmaley" operated by the 56th Separate Airborne Assault Brigade. Russian Rubicon Center operators conducted strikes across multiple directions on March 10, 2026, destroying 162 targets, including Ukrainian personnel and FPV air defense systems. Ukrainian electronic warfare struggles to counter "Lightning" drones due to unknown control frequencies, while Russian Shahed drone attacks on Sumy have decreased, possibly due to production issues, increased EW activity, or the loss of Starlink connectivity.
